project_type: Next.js 15 frontend with React 19, Framer Motion 12, Tailwind CSS, DnD Kit
verification_instructions: Run npm run build && npm run lint in /projects/sandbox/ChronAI/frontend. Both must pass with zero errors.
environment_constraints: Open internet. Do not modify: hooks/useChatSocket.ts, lib/api.ts, lib/ws.ts, lib/voice.ts, middleware.ts, Providers.tsx, components/entity/, shared/
contribution_requirements: Use existing design token system (CSS variables in globals.css, Tailwind config). Follow existing component patterns (Card, Button, Badge, Modal, Skeleton, EmptyState). Use Framer Motion for animations. Use lucide-react icons. Keep 'use client' directive on pages.
key_patterns: Pages are 'use client' with useSession for auth. Data fetched via lib/api.ts and lib/api-extended.ts. UI components in components/ui/. Layout uses AppShell with Sidebar + TopBar. CSS variables for theming (--bg, --surface, --text-primary, etc). Motion variants for stagger animations. Skeleton states during loading. EmptyState for no-data views.
directory_structure: frontend/ root with app/ (Next.js App Router pages), components/ (ui/, layout/, chat/, ai/, autopilot/, tasks/, templates/, gmail/, slides/, voice/), lib/ (api, date-utils, templates), hooks/ (useChatSocket, useNotificationSocket), public/, types/
